burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant pain and eating discomfort

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis of recurrent shallow oral ulcers; exclude systemic disease when severe

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with topical therapy and trigger avoidance

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care and dentistry
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical corticosteroids, analgesic mouthwashes; evaluate deficiencies
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to dental care in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to dental services and topical treatments
